eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 1:30 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 2:30 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Rowe Creek Complex Fire, North of the John Day River, area including James Canyon. Zone WHH-034-C. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Rowe Creek Complex Fire, North of the John Day River, area including James Canyon. Zone WHH-034-C..
